title: rubus helveticus
intro: Rubus helveticus, also known as the Alpine bramble or Alpine blackberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus helveticus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
